library.title: Local Library

library.gascii_assets_required_desc: Put video files in VIDEO and audio files in AUDIO. Click each card to open the target folder.

assets.title: Asset Manager
assets.desc_gascii: Extract media from YouTube URLs to local storage.
assets.desc_mienjine: Download default models, motions, and BGM assets.

guide.title: Guide & Documentation
guide.desc: Learn about the core mechanics and usage.
guide.gascii_desc: Gascii is a high-performance terminal-based media extraction and processing utility. It converts standard video pipelines into lightweight ASCII matrix displays directly inside your terminal environment.
guide.gascii_f1: Direct YouTube API integration for MP4/MP3 retrieval
guide.gascii_f3: Seamless audio-visual synchronization without UI overhead
guide.mienjine_desc: MiEnjine is a specialized 3D rendering engine built for the terminal and web, designed to render GLB and MMD (PMX/VMD) files with extreme efficiency.
guide.mienjine_f1: Native support for PMX character models and VMD motion files
guide.mienjine_f2: Integrated audio playback synced with camera and stage animations
guide.mienjine_f3: Advanced lighting and physics calculation within a minimal footprint
